ddls:
CREATE TABLE "armor" (
  "armor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each armor piece */,
  "armor_name" TEXT /* Name of the armor */,
  "armor_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the armor type */,
  "ac" TEXT /* Armor Class (AC) calculation based on dexterity */,
  "strength_requirement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the strength requirement */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the armor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the armor */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the armor */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the armor was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the armor was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("armor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_armor_armor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("armor_type_id") REFERENCES armor_types ("armor_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_armor_strength_requirement_id FOREIGN KEY ("strength_requirement_id") REFERENCES strength_requirements ("strength_requirement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "armor_types" (
  "armor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the armor type */,
  "armor_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the armor type (e.g., Light, Medium, Heavy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the armor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("armor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strength_requirements" (
  "strength_requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the strength requirement */,
  "required_strength" INTEGER /* Strength value required to wear this armor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strength_requirement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weight_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight change log entry */,
  "armor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the armor piece whose weight is being logged */,
  "weight" REAL /* New weight of the armor */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the weight change was recorded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weight change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weight_log_armor_id FOREIGN KEY ("armor_id") REFERENCES armor ("armor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, tester) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_armor_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "armor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the armor piece that was changed */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_armor_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_armor_history_armor_id FOREIGN KEY ("armor_id") REFERENCES armor ("armor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "armor_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "armor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the armor piece */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the armor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_armor_versions_armor_id FOREIGN KEY ("armor_id") REFERENCES armor ("armor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_data" (
  "game_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game data entry */,
  "armor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the armor piece */,
  "game_version" TEXT /* Version of the game */,
  "armor_usage" INTEGER /* Number of times the armor was used in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_data_armor_id FOREIGN KEY ("armor_id") REFERENCES armor ("armor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "data" TEXT /* Report data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
